range: length between <MinLength> and <MaxLength>
feature: Restrict the number of elements in the list

range: each element between <MinValue> and <MaxValue>
feature: Restrict the value range of each element in the list

range: number of unique elements between <MinCount> and <MaxCount>
feature: Restrict the number of unique elements in the set

range: elements must be within <AllowedValuesList>
feature: Restrict set elements to specific allowed values

range: number of key-value pairs between <MinSize> and <MaxSize>
feature: Restrict the number of key-value pairs in the map

range: keys must match regex <KeyPattern>
feature: Restrict the format of keys in the map

range: tuple size must be exactly <TupleSize>
feature: Restrict the number of elements in the tuple

range: each field type must match <TypeList>
feature: Restrict the type of each field in the tuple

range: row count and column count between <MinSize> and <MaxSize>
feature: Restrict the number of rows and columns in the matrix

range: each cell value between <MinValue> and <MaxValue>
feature: Restrict the value range of each cell in the matrix

range: tree depth between <MinDepth> and <MaxDepth>
feature: Restrict the depth of the tree

range: number of nodes between <MinNodes> and <MaxNodes>
feature: Restrict the total number of nodes in the tree

range: number of vertices between <MinVertices> and <MaxVertices>
feature: Restrict the number of vertices in the graph

range: number of edges between <MinEdges> and <MaxEdges>
feature: Restrict the number of edges in the graph

range: specific fields must satisfy <FieldConstraints>
feature: Restrict value ranges for specific fields in the struct

range: number of non-null fields between <MinFields> and <MaxFields>
feature: Restrict the number of non-null fields in the struct

range: string length between <MinLength> and <MaxLength>
feature: Restrict the length of the string

range: characters must match regex <Pattern>
feature: Restrict the character content of the string

range: number of keys between <MinKeys> and <MaxKeys>
feature: Restrict the number of keys in the JSON object

range: specific fields must exist and match type <FieldTypeConstraints>
feature: Require specific fields to exist and match type constraints in the JSON object

range: must be true or false depending on <Condition>
feature: Restrict the boolean value based on a condition

range: integer value between <MinValue> and <MaxValue>
feature: Restrict the value range of an integer

range: float value between <MinValue> and <MaxValue>
feature: Restrict the value range of a float

range: length between <MinLength> and <MaxLength> and each element between <MinValue> and <MaxValue>
feature: Restrict both list size and element value range

range: number of elements between <MinCount> and <MaxCount> and elements must be from <AllowedValuesList>
feature: Restrict both set size and allowed values

range: number of entries between <MinSize> and <MaxSize> and keys must match regex <KeyPattern>
feature: Restrict both map size and key format

range: tuple size must be exactly <TupleSize> and each element type must match <TypeList>
feature: Restrict tuple size and element types

range: row and column counts between <MinSize> and <MaxSize> and each cell value between <MinValue> and <MaxValue>
feature: Restrict matrix dimensions and cell value range

range: tree depth between <MinDepth> and <MaxDepth> and number of children per node between <MinChildren> and <MaxChildren>
feature: Restrict both tree depth and branching factor

range: number of vertices between <MinVertices> and <MaxVertices> and number of edges between <MinEdges> and <MaxEdges>
feature: Restrict both graph size and edge count

range: specific fields must exist and field values must satisfy <FieldValueConstraints>
feature: Require specific fields and restrict their values

range: string length between <MinLength> and <MaxLength> and content must match regex <Pattern>
feature: Restrict both string length and character content

range: number of keys between <MinKeys> and <MaxKeys> and specific fields must match type <FieldTypeConstraints>
feature: Restrict JSON object size and field type requirements

range: integer value between <MinValue> and <MaxValue> and must satisfy <AdditionalCondition>
feature: Restrict integer value range and additional conditions like divisibility

range: float value between <MinValue> and <MaxValue> and precision must not exceed <DecimalPlaces>
feature: Restrict float range and decimal precision
